remarks: Welcome home to this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2-full-bath first-floor apartment in Stamford's desirable Glenbrook neighborhood. Featuring hardwood floors throughout, this spacious home offers comfort, convenience, and exceptional outdoor living. The primary bedroom suite includes a private full bath with a walk-in shower stall and heated floors, creating a relaxing retreat. The inviting living room is anchored by a cozy gas fireplace and opens through elegant French doors to a private, fenced backyard complete with an in-ground swimming pool, patio and outdoor grill-perfect for entertaining or unwinding after a long day. UTILITIES are included (with the exception of cable), providing added value and ease of living. One assigned parking space is available in the shared driveway. Ideally located within walking distance of the Glenbrook Metro-North Train Station, this home offers a convenient commute to New York City while keeping you close to shopping, restaurants, parks, and everything Stamford has to offer. Don't miss this unique opportunity to enjoy the comfort of a single-level home with exceptional amenities in a prime location.
